subcodes.first_line: O My Afnán! Upon thee be My glory! We have, in accordance with Our wisdom, withheld the Pen from making mention of thee. Verily thy Lord is the All-Glorious [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا افنانی علیک بهائی انا امسکنا القلم عن ذکرکم حکمه من عندنا ان ربکم الابهی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
